---
title: "visualisation"
format: html
editor: source
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(extrafont)
library(janitor)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
```

## Preparing data for figures

Transforms the output of `analysis.qmd` into plot-ready data frames, converting
proportions to percentages and standardising variable names.

```{r}
# Round percentages with largest-remainder method. typ-level (six categories)
# and big_type-level (three categories) are rounded INDEPENDENTLY within each
# survey-year — each chart's labels sum to exactly 100, but rolled-up totals
# across figures 4 and 4a may differ by ±1pp. See CHANGELOG 2026-05-04.
figure4_pct <- figure4 |>
  group_by(survey) |>
  mutate(prop = round_to_100(prop)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-prob_big) |>
  left_join(
    figure4 |>
      distinct(survey, big_type, prob_big) |>
      group_by(survey) |>
      mutate(prob_big = round_to_100(prob_big)) |>
      ungroup(),
    by = c("survey", "big_type")
  )

figure4proper <- figure4_pct |>
  select(-contains("weight")) |>
  rename(
    type           = big_type,
    response       = typ,
    percentage     = prop,
    percentage_type = prob_big,
    year           = survey
  ) |>
  select(response, type, percentage, percentage_type, everything()) |>
  mutate(
    response = case_when(
      response == "Prelude"    ~ "Prelude to marriage",
      response == "Trial"      ~ "Trial marriage",
      response == "Economic"   ~ "Economic reasons",
      response == "Refusal"    ~ "Refusal of marriage",
      response == "Irrelevant" ~ "Marriage is irrelevant",
      TRUE ~ response
    )
  ) |>
  # pp change and max value per response
  left_join(
    figure4_pct |>
      rename(response = typ, percentage = prop, year = survey) |>
      mutate(
        response = case_when(
          response == "Prelude"    ~ "Prelude to marriage",
          response == "Trial"      ~ "Trial marriage",
          response == "Economic"   ~ "Economic reasons",
          response == "Refusal"    ~ "Refusal of marriage",
          response == "Irrelevant" ~ "Marriage is irrelevant",
          TRUE ~ response
        )
      ) |>
      pivot_wider(id_cols = response, names_from = year,
                  names_prefix = "year_", values_from = percentage) |>
      mutate(pp_change = year_2021 - year_2005) |>
      group_by(response) |>
      mutate(max = max(year_2005, year_2021)) |>
      ungroup() |>
      pivot_longer(cols = c(year_2005, year_2021), names_to = "year",
                   names_prefix = "year_", values_to = "percentage") |>
      select(-percentage),
    by = join_by(response, year)
  ) |>
  # pp change and max value per big type
  left_join(
    figure4_pct |>
      rename(type = big_type, year = survey, percentage_type = prob_big) |>
      group_by(type, year) |>
      summarise(percentage_type = max(percentage_type), .groups = "drop") |>
      pivot_wider(id_cols = type, names_from = year, values_from = percentage_type) |>
      mutate(pp_change_type = `2021` - `2005`) |>
      group_by(type) |>
      mutate(max_type = max(`2021`, `2005`)) |>
      ungroup() |>
      pivot_longer(cols = c(`2021`, `2005`), names_to = "year",
                   values_to = "percentage_type") |>
      select(-percentage_type),
    by = join_by(type, year)
  ) |>
  arrange(type, response)
```

```{r}
# Round so the six typ percentages sum to 100 within each survey-year × age band.
figure5_pct <- figure5 |>
  group_by(survey, age4) |>
  mutate(prop = round_to_100(prop)) |>
  ungroup()

figure5proper <- figure5_pct |>
  rename(response = typ, percentage = prop, age_group = age4, year = survey) |>
  select(-contains("weight")) |>
  left_join(
    figure5_pct |>
      rename(response = typ, percentage = prop, age_group = age4, year = survey) |>
      pivot_wider(id_cols = c(response, age_group), values_from = percentage,
                  names_from = year, names_prefix = "year_") |>
      group_by(response, age_group) |>
      mutate(max = max(year_2021, year_2005)) |>
      ungroup() |>
      mutate(pp_change = year_2021 - year_2005) |>
      pivot_longer(cols = c(year_2021, year_2005), names_to = "year",
                   names_prefix = "year_", values_to = "percentage") |>
      select(-percentage),
    by = join_by(response, age_group, year)
  ) |>
  arrange(response, age_group, year)
```

```{r}
# Round so the six typ percentages sum to 100 within each survey-year × education.
figure6_pct <- figure6 |>
  group_by(survey, edu3) |>
  mutate(prop = round_to_100(prop)) |>
  ungroup()

figure6proper <- figure6_pct |>
  rename(response = typ, percentage = prop, type = edu3, year = survey) |>
  select(-contains("weight")) |>
  left_join(
    figure6_pct |>
      rename(response = typ, percentage = prop, type = edu3, year = survey) |>
      pivot_wider(id_cols = c(response, type), values_from = percentage,
                  names_from = year, names_prefix = "year_") |>
      group_by(response, type) |>
      mutate(max = max(year_2021, year_2005)) |>
      ungroup() |>
      mutate(pp_change = year_2021 - year_2005) |>
      pivot_longer(cols = c(year_2021, year_2005), names_to = "year",
                   names_prefix = "year_", values_to = "percentage") |>
      select(-percentage),
    by = join_by(response, type, year)
  ) |>
  arrange(response, type, year) |>
  mutate(type = case_match(type, "low" ~ "Low", "mid" ~ "Medium", "high" ~ "High"))
```

## Theme for figures

```{r}
#| message: false
# Get the Jost font at https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Jost
loadfonts(device = "win")

theme_nice <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Jost") +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(family = "Jost", face = "bold"),
          axis.title = element_text(family = "Jost Medium"),
          axis.title.x = element_text(hjust = 0),
          axis.title.y = element_text(hjust = 1),
          strip.text = element_text(family = "Jost", face = "bold",
                                    size = rel(0.75), hjust = 0),
          strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA))
}

theme_set(theme_nice())
update_geom_defaults("text", list(family = "Jost", fontface = "plain"))
update_geom_defaults("label", list(family = "Jost", fontface = "plain"))
```

## Figure 4 - by year with aggregation to larger cohabitation types

#### Base plot

```{r}
nudge_value <- 1.5

figure_4 <-
  figure4proper |>
  mutate(type = factor(type, levels = c("Forerunners - most likely getting married",
                                        "Forerunners - possibly getting married",
                                        "Alternatives - unlikely to get married"))) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = percentage, y = response)) +

  # arrow shaft
  geom_segment(data = \(d) d |>
                 group_by(type, response) |>
                 arrange(year) |>
                 summarise(x_start = first(percentage),
                           x_end = last(percentage),
                           change = x_end - x_start,
                           .groups = "drop"),
               aes(x = x_start, xend = x_end, y = response, yend = response),
               color = "#E7E7E7", linewidth = 3.5) +

  # arrowhead
  geom_segment(data = \(d) d |>
                 group_by(type, response) |>
                 arrange(year) |>
                 summarise(x_start = first(percentage),
                           x_end = last(percentage),
                           change = x_end - x_start,
                           x_arrow_start = x_end - (x_end - x_start) * 0.05,
                           .groups = "drop"),
               aes(x = x_arrow_start, xend = x_end, y = response, yend = response),
               color = "#E7E7E7", linewidth = 3.5,
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.4, "cm"), type = "closed", angle = 25)) +

  geom_point(aes(color = year, shape = year), size = 3) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("2005" = 15, "2021" = 16)) +

  geom_text(aes(label = percentage, color = year),
            size = 3.25,
            nudge_x = if_else(figure4proper$percentage == figure4proper$max,  nudge_value, -nudge_value),
            hjust   = if_else(figure4proper$percentage == figure4proper$max,  0, 1)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = year, color = year),
            data = \(d) d |> filter(response == "Prelude to marriage"),
            nudge_y = .25, fontface = "bold", size = 3.25) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c("#436685", "#BF2F24")) +
  facet_wrap(vars(type), nrow = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 50, 10)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 50)) +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, color = "Year") +
  theme_nice() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

figure_4

ggsave(
  filename = file.path("plots", "figure_4.png"),
  plot = figure_4,
  width = 4.9, height = 5.5, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white"
)
```

#### Aggregated plot

```{r}
nudge_value <- 1.5

figure4_aggr <-
  figure4proper |>
  group_by(type, year) |>
  summarise(pp_change = max(pp_change_type),
            max = max(max_type),
            percentage = max(percentage_type),
            .groups = "drop")

figure_4a <-
  figure4_aggr |>
  mutate(type = factor(type, levels = c("Alternatives - unlikely to get married",
                                        "Forerunners - possibly getting married",
                                        "Forerunners - most likely getting married"))) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = percentage, y = type)) +
  geom_segment(data = \(d) d |>
                 group_by(type) |>
                 arrange(year) |>
                 summarise(x_start = first(percentage),
                           x_end = last(percentage),
                           .groups = "drop"),
               aes(x = x_start, xend = x_end, y = type, yend = type),
               color = "#E7E7E7", linewidth = 3.5,
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.5, "cm"), type = "closed", angle = 25)) +

  geom_point(aes(color = year, shape = year), size = 3) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("2005" = 15, "2021" = 16)) +

  geom_text(aes(label = percentage, color = year),
            size = 3.25,
            nudge_x = if_else(figure4_aggr$percentage == figure4_aggr$max,  nudge_value, -nudge_value),
            hjust   = if_else(figure4_aggr$percentage == figure4_aggr$max,  0, 1)) +

  geom_text(aes(label = year, color = year),
            data = \(d) d |> filter(type == "Forerunners - most likely getting married" & year == 2005),
            nudge_y = 0.25, nudge_x =  2, fontface = "bold", size = 3.25) +
  geom_text(aes(label = year, color = year),
            data = \(d) d |> filter(type == "Forerunners - most likely getting married" & year == 2021),
            nudge_y = 0.25, nudge_x = -2, fontface = "bold", size = 3.25) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c("#436685", "#BF2F24")) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("Alternatives - unlikely\nto get married",
                               "Forerunners - possibly\ngetting married",
                               "Forerunners - most likely\ngetting married")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 50, 10)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 50)) +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, color = "Year") +
  theme_nice() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

figure_4a

ggsave(
  filename = file.path("plots", "figure_4a.png"),
  plot = figure_4a,
  width = 4.9, height = 3, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white"
)
```

#### Combined plot

```{r}
figure_4complete_plot <-
  figure_4 + figure_4a +
  plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(5.5, 3))

ggsave(
  filename = file.path("plots", "figure_4complete.png"),
  plot = figure_4complete_plot,
  width = 4.9, height = 8.5, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white"
)
```

## Figure 5 - by generation

```{r}
figure_5 <-
  figure5proper |>
  mutate(
    response = factor(response,
                      levels = c("Prelude", "Trial", "Refusal",
                                 "Conformist", "Economic", "Irrelevant"),
                      labels = c("Prelude to marriage", "Trial marriage", "Refusal",
                                 "Conformist", "Economic reasons", "Marriage is irrelevant"))
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = percentage,
             color = age_group, group = age_group,
             linetype = age_group, shape = age_group)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("18-34" = "solid", "35-51" = "dashed", "52-69" = "dotted")) +
  geom_point() +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = percentage),
    size = 3.25,
    direction = "both",
    box.padding = 0.35,
    point.padding = 0.5,
    segment.size = 0.2,
    segment.alpha = 0.5,
    min.segment.length = 0.1,
    force = 0.3,
    max.iter = 3000,
    nudge_x = if_else(figure5proper$year == min(figure5proper$year), -0.3, 0.3),
    show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(vars(response)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
       color = "Age group", linetype = "Age group", shape = "Age group") +
  theme_nice() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

figure_5

ggsave(
  filename = file.path("plots", "figure_5.png"),
  plot = figure_5,
  width = 4.9, height = 5.7, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white"
)
```

## Figure 6 - by education

```{r}
figure_6 <-
  figure6proper |>
  mutate(
    response = factor(response,
                      levels = c("Prelude", "Trial", "Refusal",
                                 "Conformist", "Economic", "Irrelevant"),
                      labels = c("Prelude to marriage", "Trial marriage", "Refusal",
                                 "Conformist", "Economic reasons", "Marriage is irrelevant")),
    type = factor(type, levels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"))
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = percentage,
             color = type, group = type,
             linetype = type, shape = type)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Low" = "solid", "Medium" = "dashed", "High" = "dotted")) +
  geom_point() +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = percentage),
    size = 3.25,
    direction = "both",
    box.padding = 0.35,
    point.padding = 0.5,
    segment.size = 0.2,
    segment.alpha = 0.5,
    min.segment.length = 0.1,
    force = 0.3,
    max.iter = 3000,
    nudge_x = if_else(figure6proper$year == min(figure6proper$year), -0.3, 0.3),
    show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 40, 10)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 40)) +
  facet_wrap(vars(response)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
       color = "Education", linetype = "Education", shape = "Education") +
  theme_nice() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

figure_6

ggsave(
  filename = file.path("plots", "figure_6.png"),
  plot = figure_6,
  width = 4.9, height = 5.7, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white"
)
```
